sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90394" key="pro/sxusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρόσ-χῠσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n90394.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pouring upon, sprinkling</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ αἵματος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg019.perseus-grc1:11:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Hebr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.28</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
